title: Palm Springs ShortFest Returns in June – Film News in Brief
content:
ThePalm Springs International ShortFestwill return from June 23-29 for the 32nd annual showcase of short-form cinema.

Last year, the fest programmed the Oscar-winning live action short “The Singers,” Oscar-nominated live action short “Jane Austen’s Period Drama,” Oscar-nominated documentary short “The Devil Is Busy” and the Oscar-nominated animated shorts “Forevergreen” and “Retirement Plan.”

Awards and cash prizes worth $25,000, including five Academy Award-qualifying awards, will be announced on June 28, with the Best of the Fest program screening on the final day, June 29.

Jon M. Chu Joins USC School of Cinematic Arts Board of Councilors

Filmmaker Jon M. Chu has been named to the Board of Councilors at the USC School of Cinematic Arts, the university announced.

Chu, an alumnus of the program, joins a high-profile group of industry leaders who help guide the school’s strategic planning, development and fundraising efforts. The board is chaired by Donna Langley and includes members such as Steven Spielberg, Shonda Rhimes and Ryan Coogler.

USC School of Cinematic Arts Dean Elizabeth M. Daley praised Chu’s longstanding connection to the institution, noting his continued engagement with students as a speaker and mentor. Langley added that his collaborative approach and industry experience will benefit emerging creatives.

A 2003 graduate of USC’s film and television production program, Chu has remained active with the school, including launching the Jon M. Chu Cinematic Arts Endowed Scholarship in 2021. He also received an honorary doctorate from USC in 2025 and delivered the university’s commencement address.

“USC is where my dreams of becoming a storyteller first took flight,” Chu said in a statement. “I’m a product of the generosity of this community, of alumni and mentors who opened doors I didn’t even know existed both in the craft but also in myself.”

Chu is known for directing major studio projects including “Crazy Rich Asians” and “In the Heights,” as well as “Wicked” and “Wicked: For Good.” He is currently developing new projects including a Britney Spears biopic and Dr. Seuss’ “Oh, The Places You’ll Go!”

The National Hispanic Media Coalition to Honor Apple TV’s “The Studio,” Belissa Escobedo, Beth de Araújo and “Kpop Demon Hunters” Writers Danya Jimenez and Hannah McMechan

Comedians Chris Estrada and Frankie Quinones will host NHMC’s annual Impact Awards Gala on Friday, April 24, at the Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills.

“Latinos have been an integral part of Hollywood since its earliest days, building it, shaping it, fueling its creativity, and sustaining its culture,” said NHMC president and CEO Brenda Victoria Castillo. “This year’s honorees are the latest examples of our voices having an impact and leading their work into award and cultural recognition. We are honored to recognize this incredibly talented group.”

“The Studio” co-creator, writer and co-executive producer Frida Perez, actress Keyla Monterroso Mejia, music editor and composer Lorena Perez Batista and composer Antonio Sanchez will accept the Beyond the Lens Impact Award for their collective contribution to the hit Apple TV comedy. “Happy Place” star Belissa Escobedo will be recognized with the Outstanding Actress Performance in a Series award, saluting her contribution to Latino visibility on screen.

Beth de Araújo is being honored with the Visionary Impact Award for her feature film “Josephine.” The movie premiered earlier this year at the Sundance Film Festival, where it won the audience award and the grand jury prize, and screened in the main competition lineup at the Berlin International Film Festival. “KPop Demon Hunters” co-writers Danya Jimenez and Hannah McMechan will receive the Storytelling Impact Award for the Netflix movie, which won the Academy Award for best animated feature last month.

Concourse Media Hires Jack Sheehan as President of Worldwide Sales

Distribution company Concourse Media has hired Jack Sheehan as the company’s new president of worldwide sales. Sheehan will spearhead global sales strategy, working with CEO Matthew Shreder and the company’s financing partners to launch market-ready projects.Sheehan was previously president of worldwide sales & development at Archstone Entertainment, overseeing the sales and acquisitions of a slate that includes “Chili Finger,” newly released sci-fi comedy “Operation Taco,” and “American Dreamer” starring Peter Dinklage and Shirley MacLaine. Prior to Archstone, he was VP of Sales & Acquisitions at Lotus Entertainment, a WME motion picture agent trainee, and had stints at Universal and Sony.“As Concourse blazes new trails in film financing and sales, I’m thrilled to join Matt and the rest of the team to help expand and accelerate that growth,” said Sheehan. “Never before has there been a stronger hunger for original stories for mass audiences, and Concourse is in pole position to deliver. I thank Scott, Michael, Heather, Alex, and Anne at Archstone for incredible memories on set, at the markets, and in between, and wish them all the best in their next chapter.”

Whoopi Goldberg Joins Animated Feature “Captain Zero: The Movie” as Executive Producer

Whoopi Goldberg has joined the producing team of “Captain Zero: The Movie,” an upcoming animated feature from Cutting Edge Animation. Goldberg will serve as executive producer alongside longtime collaborator Tom Leonardis under their One Ho Productions banner.“Captain Zero” is a 2D animated action-drama that follows Haitian American teenager Xerxes Hughes as he “navigates life as a student, son, and friend while secretly living as a superhero – battling a dangerous cyber stalker and confronting the living embodiment of his own depression.”

The film features an ensemble voice cast including Keith David (“President Curtis”), Zolee Griggs (“Wu-Tang: An American Saga”), Gary LeRoi Gray (“The Fairly OddParents”), Angelica Ross (“American Horror Story”), and Z Cher-Aimé, with additional casting to be announced.“Captain Zero: The Movie” expands on the material introduced in the animated short “Captain Zero: Into the Abyss Part II,” which was released in June 2025.“When I first heard about this project, I loved the theme of getting to a better place,” said Goldberg. “It is about not falling into an abyss of sadness and isolation and reminds us that we are not alone, and that whatever is happening, we can get through it. That resonated deeply with me, so I was thrilled to get involved.”The producing team also includes Ross, Troy Pryor, Coty Galloway, and Cher-Aimé, who also wrote the feature, alongside Andre Engco. The film is currently in development.

Global Sales Launched for Art World Documentary “The Hammer”

Global sales have been launched on “The Hammer,” a documentary of the life and career of legendary auctioneer Simon de Pury. Sales will be handled by executive producer Catherine Quantschnigg.

Directed by Simon Wallon, “The Hammer” will give audiences a rare glimpse into de Pury’s life, focusing on his journey from managing private collections to leading auction houses like Sotheby’s. The film features contemporary artists including Marina Abramović, Jeff Koons and Chloe Wise.

“Simon de Pury has long been a singular figure in the art world, but this film reveals the man behind the myth. In these uncertain and unstable times, art remains a powerful unifier and ‘The Hammer’ offers both insight and entertainment. We’re excited to introduce the film to international buyers,” said Quantschnigg in a statement.

“The Hammer” is co-financed and co-produced by Aleksey Ageyev, Simon Wallon of Kiss & Kill, Julia and Victoria Zayceva of Forma Pro (Latvia), Asya Nikolaeva of On a Whim Films, Mike and Tanya Ovcharenko of Lazy Mike Gallery, David Unger of Artist International Group and Daniel Braun of Submarine Entertainment, alongside Black Square Magazine.

Film Independent Unveils 2026 Screenwriting Lab Fellows, Awards $25,000 Climate Grant

Film Independent has named seven fellows for its 2026 Screenwriting Lab, with the annual program set to launch April 6, the organization announced Monday.

Selected writers Andrés Pérez-Duarte, Emma He, Maddie McCann, Sam Osborn, Rammy Park, Alissa Torvinen and Alejandra Vasquez will take part in the intensive lab, now in its 27th year, which focuses on developing fiction feature screenplays through individualized mentorship and workshops.

“We’re so excited to support this outstanding cohort of writers who approach their work with nuance and creativity,” said Dea Vazquez, associate director of fiction programs.

Creative advisors for the 2026 lab include Linda Yvette Chávez, Phil Hay, Javier Fuentes-León, Matt Manfredi and Robin Swicord, alongside a roster of guest speakers. Among them is HIKARI, who previously developed her debut feature in the lab, following in the footsteps of alumni like Chloé Zhao and Andrew Ahn.

In addition, Torvinen has been awarded the second annual Climate Entertainment Development Grant, a $25,000 prize presented in partnership with Plot Shift Media. The grant supports Torvinen’s feature “Extinction of the Badger Duck,” a project centered on the rediscovery of a mythic bird and the frenzy it sparks.

The Screenwriting Lab has served as a launching pad for notable indie projects, including recent festival titles and award-winning features. The program is part of Film Independent’s broader Artist Development initiatives, which aim to support emerging filmmakers through labs, mentorship and grants.

Film Independent produces the annual Film Independent Spirit Awards and has spent more than four decades championing independent storytelling.
title_zh: 《棕櫚泉短片節》(Palm Springs ShortFest) 將於六月回歸 – 短片電影新聞摘要
content_zh:
棕櫚泉國際短片節(Palm Springs International ShortFest)將於6月23日至29日回歸，舉辦第32屆短片電影展。

去年，該節目放映了奧斯卡獲獎的真人短片《歌手(The Singers)》，奧斯卡提名的真人短片《簡·奧斯丁的時代劇(Jane Austen’s Period Drama)》，奧斯卡提名的紀錄片短片《魔鬼忙碌(The Devil Is Busy)》，以及奧斯卡提名的動畫短片《永恆綠(Forevergreen)》和《退休計劃(Retirement Plan)》。

獎項和總值25,000美元的現金獎將於6月28日公布，其中包括五個符合奧斯卡資格的獎項，最佳短片節目將於最後一天6月29日放映。

喬恩·M·周(Jon M. Chu)加入南加州大學電影藝術學院(USC School of Cinematic Arts)顧問委員會

電影製作人喬恩·M·周被任命為南加州大學電影藝術學院的顧問委員會，該大學宣布了此消息。

周是該計劃的校友，加入了一個由行業領袖組成的高端團體，幫助指導學院的戰略規劃、發展和籌款工作。該委員會由唐娜·蘭利(Donna Langley)擔任主席，成員包括史蒂芬·斯皮爾伯格(Steven Spielberg)、香農·萊姆斯(Shonda Rhimes)和瑞安·庫格勒(Ryan Coogler)。

南加州大學電影藝術學院院長伊莉莎白·M·戴利(Elizabeth M. Daley)讚揚了周與該機構的長期聯繫，指出他作為演講者和導師持續與學生互動。蘭利補充說，他的合作方式和行業經驗將使新興創意人才受益。

周於2003年畢業於南加州大學的電影與電視製作課程，並持續與學校保持活躍聯繫，包括在2021年成立喬恩·M·周電影藝術獎學金。他還於2025年獲得南加州大學的榮譽博士學位，並發表了該校的畢業典禮演講。

周在聲明中表示：“南加州大學是我成為講故事者夢想首次起飛的地方。我是這個社區的慷慨、校友和導師的產物，他們為我打開了我甚至不知道存在的門，不僅在技藝上，也在我自身。”

周以執導大型製片廠項目而聞名，包括《瘋狂的亞洲富豪(Crazy Rich Asians)》和《高地(In the Heights)》，以及《邪惡(Wicked)》和《邪惡：為了美好(Wicked: For Good)》。他目前正在開發包括布蘭妮·斯皮爾斯(Britney Spears)的傳記片和蘇斯博士(Dr. Seuss)的《哦，你將去的地方(Oh, The Places You’ll Go!)》等新項目。

全國西班牙裔媒體聯盟(National Hispanic Media Coalition)將表彰Apple TV的《工作室(The Studio)》，貝莉莎·埃斯科貝多(Belissa Escobedo)、貝絲·德·阿拉胡(Beth de Araújo)以及《Kpop惡魔獵人(Kpop Demon Hunters)》的編劇達尼亞·希門尼斯(Danya Jimenez)和漢娜·麥克梅肯(Hannah McMechan)。

喜劇演員克里斯·埃斯特拉達(Chris Estrada)和弗蘭基·金奧內斯(Frankie Quinones)將於4月24日星期五在比佛利山莊的比佛利希爾頓酒店主持NHMC的年度影響獎頒獎典禮。

NHMC總裁兼首席執行官布倫達·維多利亞·卡斯蒂略(Brenda Victoria Castillo)表示：“拉丁裔自好萊塢早期以來就是不可或缺的一部分，建設、塑造、激發其創造力並維護其文化。今年的獲獎者是我們的聲音產生影響並引領他們的工作獲得獎項和文化認可的最新例子。我們很榮幸能夠表彰這個極具才華的團體。”

《The Studio》的共同創作者、編劇及共同執行製片人弗里達·佩雷斯(Frida Perez)、女演員凱拉·蒙特羅索·梅希亞(Keyla Monterroso Mejia)、音樂編輯及作曲家洛雷娜·佩雷斯·巴蒂斯塔(Lorena Perez Batista)以及作曲家安東尼奧·桑切斯(Antonio Sanchez)將因其對蘋果電視熱門喜劇的共同貢獻而獲頒「超越鏡頭影響獎」。而《Happy Place》的明星貝莉莎·埃斯科貝多(Belissa Escobedo)將因其對拉丁裔在螢幕上可見度的貢獻而獲頒「系列劇傑出女演員表現獎」。

貝絲·德·阿拉烏霍(Beth de Araújo)因其長片《約瑟芬》(Josephine)而獲頒「遠見影響獎」。該電影於今年早些時候在聖丹斯電影節首映，並贏得了觀眾獎和大獎評審團獎，還在柏林國際電影節的主競賽單元放映。《KPop Demon Hunters》的共同編劇丹雅·希門尼斯(Danya Jimenez)和漢娜·麥克梅肯(Hannah McMechan)將因Netflix電影而獲頒「敘事影響獎」，該電影上個月贏得了奧斯卡最佳動畫長片獎。

Concourse Media任命傑克·希漢(Jack Sheehan)為全球銷售總裁

發行公司Concourse Media已任命傑克·希漢為公司的新任全球銷售總裁。希漢將負責全球銷售策略，與首席執行官馬修·施雷德(Matthew Shreder)及公司的融資夥伴合作，推出市場準備好的項目。希漢此前是Archstone Entertainment的全球銷售及開發總裁，負責包括《Chili Finger》、《剛上映的科幻喜劇《Operation Taco》及彼得·丁拉基(Peter Dinklage)和雪莉·麥克萊恩(Shirley MacLaine)主演的《American Dreamer》在內的多部影片的銷售與收購。在加入Archstone之前，他曾擔任Lotus Entertainment的銷售及收購副總裁，並在WME擔任電影代理訓練生，還曾在環球影業和索尼工作過。希漢表示：「隨著Concourse在電影融資和銷售方面開創新局，我非常高興能與馬特和其他團隊成員一起幫助擴大和加速這一增長。對於大眾而言，對原創故事的渴望從未如此強烈，而Concourse正處於交付的最佳位置。我感謝Scott、Michael、Heather、Alex和Anne在Archstone的美好回憶，祝願他們在下一章中一切順利。」

烏比·戈德堡(Whoopi Goldberg)加入動畫長片《零上尉：電影》(Captain Zero: The Movie)擔任執行製片人

烏比·戈德堡已加入即將上映的動畫長片《零上尉：電影》的製作團隊，該片由Cutting Edge Animation製作。戈德堡將與長期合作夥伴湯姆·萊昂納迪斯(Tom Leonardis)共同擔任執行製片人，並在他們的One Ho Productions品牌下工作。《零上尉》是一部2D動畫動作劇，講述海地裔美國青少年澤克西斯·休斯(Xerxes Hughes)的故事，他在秘密過著超級英雄的生活，同時面對作為學生、兒子和朋友的生活挑戰，並與一名危險的網絡跟蹤者作鬥爭，還要面對自己抑鬱的具體化身。

這部電影的配音陣容包括基思·大衛(Keith David)（飾演「庫爾蒂斯總統」）、佐莉·格里格斯(Zolee Griggs)（飾演「武當：美國傳奇」）、蓋瑞·勒羅伊·格雷(Gary LeRoi Gray)（飾演「小小兵」）、安吉莉卡·羅斯(Angelica Ross)（飾演「美國恐怖故事」）以及Z·謝爾-艾梅(Z Cher-Aimé)，其他演員名單將會稍後公布。《零上尉：電影》(Captain Zero: The Movie) 擴展了在2025年6月發布的動畫短片《零上尉：深淵之中第二部分》(Captain Zero: Into the Abyss Part II) 中介紹的素材。戈德堡(Goldberg)表示：「當我第一次聽到這個項目時，我喜歡追求更美好地方的主題。這是關於不陷入悲傷和孤立的深淵，提醒我們我們並不孤單，無論發生什麼，我們都能度過。這讓我深有共鳴，所以我很高興能參與其中。」製作團隊還包括羅斯、特洛伊·普賴爾(Troy Pryor)、科提·加洛威(Coty Galloway)和謝爾-艾梅，後者還與安德烈·恩戈(Andre Engco)共同編寫了這部影片。該電影目前正在開發中。

全球銷售啟動藝術世界紀錄片《錘子》(The Hammer)

全球銷售已經啟動《錘子》(The Hammer)，這是一部關於傳奇拍賣師西蒙·德·普瑞(Simon de Pury)的生活和職業的紀錄片。銷售將由執行製片人凱瑟琳·昆茨尼格(Catherine Quantschnigg)負責。

《錘子》由西蒙·瓦隆(Simon Wallon)執導，將讓觀眾罕見地窺探德·普瑞的生活，重點介紹他從管理私人收藏到領導像蘇富比(Sotheby’s)這樣的拍賣行的旅程。影片中還包括當代藝術家如瑪麗娜·阿布拉莫維奇(Marina Abramović)、傑夫·庫恩斯(Jeff Koons)和克洛伊·懷斯(Chloe Wise)。

昆茨尼格在一份聲明中表示：「西蒙·德·普瑞在藝術界長期以來都是一個獨特的人物，但這部電影揭示了神話背後的真實人物。在這些不確定和不穩定的時期，藝術仍然是一個強大的統一力量，而《錘子》則提供了洞察和娛樂。我們很高興能將這部電影介紹給國際買家。」

《錘子》由阿列克謝·阿基耶夫(Aleksey Ageyev)、西蒙·瓦隆(Simon Wallon)的Kiss & Kill、朱莉亞和維多利亞·扎伊采娃(Julia and Victoria Zayceva)的Forma Pro（拉脫維亞）、阿薩·尼科拉耶娃(Asya Nikolaeva)的On a Whim Films、邁克和塔尼亞·奧夫查連科(Mike and Tanya Ovcharenko)的Lazy Mike Gallery、大衛·烏恩格(David Unger)的Artist International Group以及丹尼爾·布朗(Daniel Braun)的Submarine Entertainment共同融資和製作，還有Black Square Magazine的參與。

獨立電影協會公布2026年編劇實驗室獎學金得主，頒發$25,000氣候獎助金

獨立電影協會宣佈，已選出七位2026年編劇實驗室的獎學金得主，該年度計劃將於4月6日啟動。

被選中的作家安德烈斯·佩雷斯-杜阿特(Andrés Pérez-Duarte)、何艾瑪(Emma He)、瑪迪·麥肯(Maddie McCann)、山姆·奧斯本(Sam Osborn)、拉米·帕克(Rammy Park)、艾莉莎·托維嫩(Alissa Torvinen)和亞歷杭德拉·瓦斯奎茲(Alejandra Vasquez)將參加這個已經進入第27年的密集實驗室，該實驗室專注於通過個性化的導師指導和工作坊來開發虛構的長篇劇本。

虛構項目副主任迪亞·瓦斯奎茲(Dea Vazquez)表示：「我們非常高興能支持這一出色的作家群體，他們以細膩和創造力來對待自己的作品。」

2026年工作坊的創意顧問包括琳達·伊薇特·查維茲(Linda Yvette Chávez)、菲爾·海(Phil Hay)、哈維爾·富恩特斯·萊昂(Javier Fuentes-León)、馬特·曼弗雷迪(Matt Manfredi)和羅賓·斯威考德(Robin Swicord)，以及一系列的嘉賓講者。其中包括HIKARI，她曾在工作坊中開發了她的首部長片，跟隨了像趙婷(Chloé Zhao)和安德魯·安(Andrew Ahn)等校友的腳步。

此外，托維寧(Torvinen)獲得了第二屆氣候娛樂發展獎，這是一項與Plot Shift Media合作頒發的25,000美元獎金。該獎項支持托維寧的長片《獾鴨的滅絕》(Extinction of the Badger Duck)，這是一個圍繞重新發現一種神話鳥類及其引發的狂熱的項目。

編劇工作坊一直是著名獨立項目的發射平台，包括最近的影展作品和獲獎長片。該計劃是Film Independent更廣泛的藝術家發展計劃的一部分，旨在通過工作坊、導師指導和獎助金來支持新興電影製作人。

Film Independent每年舉辦Film Independent Spirit Awards，並在過去四十多年中一直支持獨立敘事。
summary_zh:
棕櫚泉國際短片節(Palm Springs International ShortFest)將於6月23日至29日回歸，舉辦第32屆短片電影展。

去年，該節目放映了奧斯卡獲獎的真人短片《歌手(The Singers)》，奧斯卡提名的真人短片《簡·奧斯丁的時代劇(Jane Austen’s Period Drama)》，奧斯卡提名的紀錄片短片《魔鬼忙碌(The Devil Is Busy)》，以及...
